hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'docker[[:space:]]+compose[[:space:]]+build|docker-compose[[:space:]]+build'; then STATUS=$(sshpass -p 'Mentoark@2025' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@147.93.9.172 'docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Image}}\t{{.Status}}"' 2>/dev/null); printf '{"systemMessage": %s}' "$(printf 'Containers apos o build:\n%s' "$STATUS" | jq -Rs .)"; fi
